steps.title: Identify what the blank must describe
steps.content: The colon after the blank acts as a definition: "Lecuona showcased a diverse range of musical talents in different areas, from orchestral pieces and operas to popular film scores." The blank must mean diverse or showing many different kinds.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices, keep the one that means 'diverse'
steps.content:
Substitute each choice into "how ______ his body of work is":
  • Choice A — outdated: means old-fashioned or obsolete; the passage praises his impressive output, not its age. ✗
  • Choice B — varied: means showing variety or many different kinds — directly matches the colon definition listing different genres. ✓
  • Choice C — forgotten: means not remembered; the passage celebrates his work, not its obscurity. ✗
  • Choice D — lonely: means solitary; does not describe a body of work. ✗
